content:
### II. | CORE DEFINITIONS

| CATEGORY | DEFINITION | EXAMPLE |
|--------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------|
| ARTIST ID | A persona, voice, or filter through which you create or frame work | `::4_bl00m`, `::ETCETER4` |
| PROJECT | A modular work, storyworld, or system produced through one or more IDs | `::MET4morfoses`, `::GR1ND3R`|

---

### III. | SYSTEM STRUCTURE EXAMPLE

```md
::4_bl00m [ARTIST ID PROFILE]
> ROLE: Root creator, recursive designer
> PROJECTS: ::MET4morfoses, ::GR1ND3R, ::FLOAT1NG.P01NTS, ::Q_v33R
> FORMAT: All formats, master recursion
> OUTPUTS: Myth engines, project architecture, recursive logic
